creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: ak
Date: Fri Oct 24 19:42:49 UTC 2014
New revision: 371461
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/371461

Log:
  - Update to 1.6.10 [1]
    * Add support for FreeBSD 9.3 and 10.1
    * Remove a bug preventing the use of a disk cache on FreeBSD clients (as opposed to a memory cache)
  - Remove obsolete OSVERSION check
  - Unmute install commands

  PR:	194362 [1]
  Submitted by:	Benjamin Kaduk <bjk@FreeBSD.org> (maintainer) [1]

Changes:
  head/net/openafs/Makefile
  head/net/openafs/distinfo
  head/net/openafs/files/patch-Makefile.in
  head/net/openafs/files/patch-src-rx-rx_kernel.h
  head/net/openafs/files/patch-src__config__afs_sysnames.h
  head/net/openafs/files/patch-src__config__param.amd64_fbsd_101.h
  head/net/openafs/files/patch-src__config__param.amd64_fbsd_93.h
  head/net/openafs/files/patch-src__config__param.i386_fbsd_101.h
  head/net/openafs/files/patch-src__config__param.i386_fbsd_93.h
